Description: The National Arbitration and Mediation (NAM) provides alternative dispute resolution services, including arbitration, mediation, and mass arbitrations, primarily in New York State. The organization focuses on delivering high-quality service and expertise in the fields of employment law, personal injury, financial transactions, and more.

Description: Zebra offers technology solutions designed to enhance operational efficiency across various industries, including retail, healthcare, transportation, and public sector. Their products include mobile devices for asset tracking, inventory management, customer service, and communication, aimed at improving overall business performance and reducing costs. Zebra also provides tailored solutions that support businesses in areas such as field operations, food safety, manufacturing, and government services.

Name: Dee Nierzwicki
Title: Owner, Operator
Description: Zippy Shell is a moving and storage company that specializes in the transportation of portable storage containers for long-distance moves. They offer services such as on-demand mobile storage, packing and loading, and secure climate-controlled storage solutions. Customers can choose from various sizes and styles, including eco-friendly options like ZipCo, which allows for quick delivery within three days. Zippy Shell also provides custom move solutions tailored to individual needs, ensuring safe and efficient storage for belongings during relocation.
